display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave meets the inspirational owner of a Reliant Robin who's selling it to raise money for charity.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: A sun-bleached red Vauxhall Astra GTE gives the team a headache as they also buy a classic French moped and catch up on the restoration of a barn find Mini Cooper S.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The team gamble on restoring a Vanden Plas saloon from the 1970s and a child's tricycle from the 1960s while catching up on the restoration of a rare Sunbeam Lotus.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson joins forces with his brother David and uncle Matheson for landscape painting, an organised treetop adventure park and fly fishing on a picturesque Northumbrian lake.

programme.title: Robson Green's Weekend Escapes
programme.desc: Robson and podcaster Rosie Ramsey sign up for a bushcraft lesson and test the health benefits of laughter during an adrenaline-fuelled power buggy race.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Bizarrely-shaped huts in India, once home to global superstars, are now eerily quiet and neglected, and a shattered compound in Colombia linked to a criminal mastermind.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The home of an African dictator and a sporting hero - and the facility that held apartheid's greatest critic - are abandoned but still have unique stories to tell.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo explores the Province of Quebec, taking the Charlevoix train along the bank of the St Lawrence River to La Malbaie.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo strikes west across Manitoba into the province of Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo sets on his final leg, all the way to Jasper, along the way admiring Edmonton's light rail system and visiting the Rocky Mountains.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Life in some of the many deserts and grasslands around the world, including in the Namib desert, where ostriches raise their family in the searing heat.

programme.title: Planet Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough journeys into the hidden world of forests, from the temperate rainforests of Canada, to the teak forests of India.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look into the lives of mammals and how they have adapted to their surroundings. The first episode features animals that thrive in the dark.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: A look at how mammals adapt to the changes humans have made to their environment.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: How air-breathing mammals have found remarkable ways to overcome the many challenges of a life in water, from freshwater jungle ponds to the dark depths of the open ocean.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: From ice-covered seas to snow-capped mountains, mammals have conquered the cold, living in the harshest places on earth thanks to their intelligence and adaptations.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals the ways mammals survive the hottest places on earth, from camels storing water in humps to sijaka lemurs hugging trees.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: David Attenborough reveals why forests are the ultimate test of survival for mammals, including a tiger who is put to the test in the heat of an Indian summer.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Paul, Mick and Charlie are in Hull for one of their biggest ever collections. Dave takes a test drive in Tesla Model X and Derek is bowled over by a classic vintage mo.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: The Mathewson family business starts a new era as Charlie heads off on his first solo collection, to pick up an Austin van from the North York Moors.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek picks up some very special working vehicles. Charlie feels the pull of a gargantuan Hummer and Paul extracts a vintage tractor from a Yorkshire barn.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: David Renwick's masterly comic creation, Victor Meldrew. Roger, Victor's cousin, accidentally invites the couple to his 60th birthday. Big mistake.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: Why can't the Meldrews just have a nice pleasant day out? Naturally, a trip out on the river leads to epic complications for Victor and his long-suffering spouse.

programme.title: One Foot in the Grave
programme.desc: More great, dark comedy as the Meldrews are back from holiday and find that their neighbours Patrick (aka Angus Deayton) and Pippa have put their house on the market.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Charlie picks up an iconic 60s motor - a Ford Cortina Deluxe - and a 1970s Morris van brings a taste of Carry On Camping to Pickering.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When Crabtree's deranged kidnapper Amelia turns herself in, he braces for trouble.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: When a man resembling Murdoch is murdered, he must find the killer - before the killer finds him.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: When Lyle's niece Angie is accused of committing a crime on her college campus, Lyle enlists Margaret and Todd to vindicate her.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part 1: When his aunt (Derry Girls' Siobhan McSweeney) foretells a dire fate, Crabtree leaves Effie at the altar. Murdoch investigates two murders at a cemetery.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part 2: Murdoch suspects Hart is hiding information about her dead father. Meanwhile, Brackenreid warns Watts that a PI is on his trail.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects author Rudyard Kipling is involved in the murder of a writer at a convention.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: Mackenzie is presented with a classic locked-room murder when a hairdresser is found strangled to death in her beauty salon, with no evidence of a break-in.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: An activist is mysteriously bludgeoned to death while chained to an excavator with his group during a protest.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The amateur sleuth uncovers a dark secret when a contestant is murdered at a ballroom dancing competition.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: An investigation gets under way when a girl is left for dead at a boys school fete. Mark Williams stars in this drama, based on the stories by GK Chesterton.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The locals are unhappy when an ostentatious American opens a golf club near Kembleford - only for a body to turn up in the reeds.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The Two Deaths of Hercule Flambeau: Following reports of Flambeau's death, the clerical sleuth races to protect a crown that contains a nail from the crucifixion of Christ.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown's past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown receives a visit from Chief Inspector Sullivan to inform him that Hercule Flambeau is on the run and wanted for a string of horrific killings.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a calypso singer's husband. Neville struggles with Sophie's revelations and contemplates his future in Saint Marie.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: When a warden is murdered in broad daylight, Sabrina and Zak find themselves navigating the world of the unhoused and on the trail of a possible spree killer.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Father Brown's past collides with the present when he investigates a missing person, a murder and a mythical wild cat.

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: When an amateur psychic's unsettling predictions for a grieving woman's future start to come true, Humphrey must uncover the truth before it's too late.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Period drama series with the sleuthing cleric. Past and present collide when Father Brown investigates the macabre world of dollhouse crime scenes.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates when a body is dug up in the luau pit of a Hawaiian-themed hotel. Internal Affairs begins to question Grissom and Sara's return to the crime lab.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara's investigation into charges against David Hodges heats up, and a video-game developer's body is found floating in a fountain before a gaming tournament.

programme.title: Marae
programme.desc: Your way in to the Māori world and the issues that matter. Māiatanga, Whanaungatanga, Manaakitanga - We bring you stories with heart.

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: It's Biscuit Week and the bakers make Viennese sandwiches, a retro minty favourite and dramatic puppet theatres. Who'll take centre stage, and who's delivered their final act?

programme.title: Find My Country House
programme.desc: Chanel and Luke entrust Catriona to help find them their dream home in Tamworth. They visit a grand 1890's home, a modern new build, and a heritage masterpiece.

programme.title: Susan Calman's Grand Day Out
programme.desc: Susan and her campervan companion Helen travel the Cotswolds. An area of natural beauty, she finds it filled with country lanes and old Roman roads, making every turn of the 100 mile trip a treat.

programme.title: Mammals
programme.desc: From deep in the undergrowth to the highest tree, forests are home to two-thirds of all mammal species. Discover how they overcome the many challenges of life in a crowded world.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: Colin and Manu head north for a catch and cook at the Poor Knights Islands, then the road trip rolls on to the Bay of Islands for a swim and an evening of luxury at Paroa Winery. S2 E6

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Hyundai Country Calendar
programme.desc: A Timbersports Champion prepares to defend his world title, balancing intense training with running a sheep and beef farm with his partner in southern Waikato.

programme.title: Off The Grid With Colin And Manu
programme.desc: The boys head north to the Bay of Islands to cook with friends, before Ninety Mile Beach for a cook and fish in a tinny on the Kaipara Harbour.

programme.title: Grand Designs UK
programme.desc: Does good architecture have the power to heal? Kevin revisits Elinor and Born, who built a clean-aired, hypoallergenic house, motivated by their two boys' extreme allergies.

programme.title: Missed Call
programme.desc: Season Finale: Virginie follows a lead that could reveal what happened and who has been hiding the truth. S1 E5

programme.title: The Boy That Never Was
programme.desc: Forced to put their own troubles to one side, Robin and Harry seek a local policeman's help to track down Ollie. S1 E3

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
programme.desc: Join us for live coverage of the Final of the FIFA World Cup 2026 from the New York New Jersey Stadium in East Rutherford, New Jersey. Teams to be confirmed.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Ooh, Betty! It's Michael Crawford as Frank Spencer - the well-meaning and enthusiastic dunce. Frank's grandad arrives from Australia to find his grandson in drag.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford is the hapless but amiable Frank Spencer. The local labour exchange puts him to work as a motorbike courier - with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick mayhem with the hapless but friendly buffoon immortalised by Michael Crawford. Frank and Betty contemplate leaving England and emigrating to Australia.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Watch out, Frank Spencer's about. At his woodwork class, Frank's carpentry leaves a lot to be desired, and his playhouse for Jessica is a whopper of a project.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick comedy with the hapless Frank Spencer. Frank enrols in a Scottish dancing class and everything seems to be going his way. Surely not for long..

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Ooh, Betty! It's Michael Crawford as Frank Spencer - the well-meaning and enthusiastic dunce. Frank's grandad arrives from Australia to find his grandson in drag.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Michael Crawford is the hapless but amiable Frank Spencer. The local labour exchange puts him to work as a motorbike courier - with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Slapstick mayhem with the hapless but friendly buffoon immortalised by Michael Crawford. Frank and Betty contemplate leaving England and emigrating to Australia.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The desert town that faced a disaster of biblical proportions. Plus, vast coastal ruins that reveal a past once wiped from history.

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The underground base with the power to destroy a nation, the site linked with an attempt to kill a dictator, and an ancient world discovered in the American wilderness.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: Discover the harsh reality of life in wild Alaska. The Alaskan summer must sustain the wildlife for the whole year, making it a season of frenzied activity.

programme.title: Alaska: Earth's Frozen Kingdom
programme.desc: The fascinating nature series concludes. Faced with the winter's land freezes, raging storms and descending darkness, how will life hang on until the sun returns.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: The first wave of new recruits make the mammoth journey from the UK to Australia - including young mum Anna Miller, her husband and three kids - and grapple with life down under. S1 Ep.

programme.title: Brit Cops Down Under
programme.desc: Ben works his first day at Perth station, which coincides with Christmas Day. Anna's family celebrate Christmas at the beach while she sees in the New Year on the beat.

programme.title: The Voice Australia
programme.desc: Season Premiere: Blind auditions begin with coaches Ronan Keating, Kate Miller-Heidke, Richard Marx, and Melanie C diligently searching for talent.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John feels the pressure. Abigail gets an ultimatum. Beau turns on the charm.

programme.title: Home Economics
programme.desc: Marina gets high on edibles at the school musical. S2 E20

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: This week celebs take on 'Couple Goals’, a fake love themed show hosted by Matt & Emma Willis, who are totally in on the whole thing and even get set their own jaw dropping mission in a hot tub!

programme.title: Penguins Of Madagascar
programme.desc: Skipper, Kowalski, Rico and Private join forces with undercover organization The North Wind to stop the villainous Dr. Octavius Brine from destroying the world as we know it. (2014)

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing
programme.desc: Maggie accompanies Cal to his parents' house. Meanwhile, Sully and Frank try to find out who is behind the real estate project. S3 E3

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: Will they hit rough seas, or could it be a barrel of laughs? Olympian boardsailor Barbara Kendall and comedians Ben Hurley and Courtney Dawson compete for the chance to win $10,000 for their charities

programme.title: Booze Patrol
programme.desc: Disability pensioner Kieron claims he kicked his cannabis habit years ago... oh, except he had some on a night out last week... and then a whole lot more the following day. S16 E8

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Curtis Stone kicks off Aussie Classics week. A once-in-a-lifetime chance for the cooks to have their dish stocked in Coles. They are challenged to whip up nostalgic Pie and Ice-cream flavours.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Wonderful web-slinging Marvel blockbuster starring Tom Holland and Robert Downey Jr. While Peter Parker tackles school, Spider-Man faces a new menace prowling the skies of New York City. (2017)

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: When Amy and Michael take Katie on a road trip to college, they pass a familiar campsite and decide to stop and hike the trail; the journey becomes harrowing when they discover an injured man. S2 E18

programme.title: Pam & Tommy
programme.desc: The tape falls into the hands of Penthouse publisher Bob Guccione; Tommy is concerned fame has passed him by. S1 E5

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: Helen reflects on her relationship with Elliot and finds herself drawn to the mysteries of the past. S2 E5

programme.title: Perfect Wife
programme.desc: Series Premiere: When young mother Sherri Papini vanishes a mile from her rural California home during a morning jog, all eyes are on her husband Keith. S1 E1

programme.title: The Nanny
programme.desc: Fran invites Maxwell to her family reunion at Niagara Falls hoping he'll feel romantic. S5 E10

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature.

programme.title: Buzz's Epic Little Missions
programme.desc: Buzz ventures into te taiaio to build a cool-as hut, goes off on a milking mission with the cows next door, explores some huge machines, and writes his very own rap!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join these beloved blue characters as they go on all new adventures that will push the charm, absurdity, and humour of the original series to even greater heights!

programme.title: Scooby Doo And Guess Who?
programme.desc: The team is back and just as courageous, adventurous, humorous & obsessed with cases like before. They are joined by celebrities in their adventures and ghost hunts and in search of puzzles to solve.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: The superheroes Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy love saving the world. But after they decide to stop fighting crime, things do not go as planned.

programme.title: Lu And The Bally Bunch
programme.desc: Navigating preschool life can be tricky! Lu the affectionate ladybird is used to getting her own way - but now, alongside her new classmates, she must learn what it means to be a good friend.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Takaro Tribe as they sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whanau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Curtis Stone kicks off Aussie Classics week. A once-in-a-lifetime chance for the cooks to have their dish stocked in Coles. They are challenged to whip up nostalgic Pie and Ice-cream flavours.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Edina's weight problem becomes critical when she hears she is going to be visited by her reed-like model friend from the 60s. S1 E2

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: David comes clean. Tane texts his ex. Jo misreads the situation. Remi feels like a third wheel.
